_meta.description: Mission registry — user-defined goals the agent fleet mobilizes around

design-an-autonomous-mars-colony-habitat.goal: Design an autonomous Mars colony habitat that can sustain 4 crew members for 500 sols with zero Earth resupply
design-an-autonomous-mars-colony-habitat.context: Focus on power systems, food production, thermal regulation, and radiation shielding. Use real Jezero Crater telemetry. The colony must survive dust storms autonomously.
